error.signature: grpc._channel._InactiveRpcError: StatusCode.RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED: Quota exceeded; rate limit reached

verdict.summary: gRPC call rejected due to rate limiting or resource quota exceeded. Server-side concurrency limit or external quota.

dead_ends.why_fails: Immediate retries during rate limiting flood the server and extend the backoff window. Use exponential backoff.

dead_ends.action: Open multiple channels to bypass rate limits
dead_ends.why_fails: Server-side rate limits typically apply per-user or per-API-key, not per-connection. Multiple channels hit the same limit.

workarounds.action: Implement exponential backoff with jitter on RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED
workarounds.how: Retry with base_delay * 2^attempt + random_jitter; respect Retry-After header if present in trailing metadata

workarounds.action: Use client-side rate limiting to stay below quota
workarounds.how: Implement a token bucket or leaky bucket limiter on the client side to smooth out request bursts

workarounds.action: Request quota increase from the service provider if limits are too low
